intro: Tapeinia viridis, also known as Green Tapeinia, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering various health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in the treatment of wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Green Tapeinia include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Green Tapeinia is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is also used in the form of tinctures and ointments to take advantage of its therapeutic benefits.
